---
title: Test
lang: fr
format: markdown
_quarto:
  tests:
    markdown:
      printsMessage:
        - level: INFO
          regex: "toc-title-document"
          negate: true
        - level: INFO
          regex: "crossref-ch-prefix"
          negate: true
---

# Section

A paragraph in French (`lang: fr`). The internal `quarto.*` template
variable namespace must not flood the rendered pandoc defaults message
printed to the console.
